span_mappings.nl_span: For every natural n, the one-bit positions of 2n+1 are zero followed by the one-bit positions of n shifted by one

formal_statement: theorem qa_mathlib03_bit_indices_odd (n : Nat) : (2 * n + 1).bitIndices = 0 :: List.map (fun x => x + 1) n.bitIndices
natural_language_claim: For every natural n, the one-bit positions of 2n+1 are zero followed by the one-bit positions of n shifted by one.
